name: ctop-claude
description: Terminal UI for monitoring and managing AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code + Codex CLI + OpenCode)

scripts.gif: scripts/mock-sessions.sh && vhs assets/hero.tape && vhs assets/features.tape && gifsicle -O3 --lossy=80 --colors 64 -b assets/hero.gif && gifsicle -O3 --lossy=80 --colors 64 -b assets/features.gif && scripts/mock-sessions.sh cleanup

author: Aakash Adesara
